description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa with a modern yet classic design, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The seat and backrest feature button-tufted detailing, giving it a refined and slightly vintage appearance. The armrests are gently curved and padded, providing comfort and a cohesive silhouette that flows into the backrest. The sofa stands on four short, turned wooden legs with a natural finish, adding a touch of warmth and contrast to the overall look. The backrest is continuous and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic support. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with plush cushioning for both the seat and back.
description: A dark gray, button-tufted two-seater sofa with curved padded armrests and short turned wooden legs. The design is modern-classic, with a continuous backrest and plush cushioning.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and both curved armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's depth, the curve of the armrest, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest and the wooden legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Angled side view reveals the sofa's profile, armrest curvature, and the transition between seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion, both with button-tufted detailing and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests at each end, medium height relative to the seat, smoothly integrated into the sofa's silhouette with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned wooden legs positioned at the corners, exposed with a natural wood finish and classic rounded profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a gentle recline and button-tufted surface, providing a unified and supportive structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with button-tufted texture on the backrest and seat, no visible decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
